items.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Threatens 100% Canada Tariff; Tesla, Microsoft, Meta, Apple Lead Earnings Wave
items.description: President Donald Trump threatened a 100% tariff on Canada if it makes a trade deal with China, a week after endorsing the idea. Tesla, Microsoft, Meta and Apple lead an earnings wave.

items.title: Why United Airlines (UAL) Is Down 5.1% After Record 2025 Results And Aggressive 2026 Expansion Plans
items.description: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. has already reported fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results, posting record quarterly revenue of US$15,397 million and full-year revenue of US$59,070 million, with higher net income and diluted EPS than the prior year. Management credited strong premium and loyalty revenue growth, record passenger volumes, and operational reliability, while outlining ambitious 2026 plans including more than 100 new narrowbody jets, about 20 Boeing 787s, and major airport...

items.title: Vertical Aerospace wants to 'democratize' urban air travel with its Valo air taxi
items.description: Air taxis are going from a Jetsons-like dream to near reality.

items.title: Market Week Ahead: Fed Meeting, Shutdown Risks, And Heavy Earnings
items.description: The stock market faces a Fed meeting, a federal funding deadline, a heavy earnings slate and harsh winter weather in the coming week.

items.title: Jim Cramer Says “You Can’t Defeat Boeing”
items.description: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer shared his take on. Cramer explained his and his team’s bullish stance on the company, as he remarked: What did we know about Boeing? Well, it hasn’t reported yet. We bought it aggressively and all the way down endlessly because management told us that […]
